title: Update README files with PATH guidance
summary: Update README documentation to include the PATH guidance in the setting.json example.
acceptance_criteria: README.md includes the updated setting.json example with PATH.
README-jp.md includes the updated setting.json example with PATH.
No remaining README references to workspace_root in configuration examples.

steps.description: Locate setting.json examples in README.md and README-jp.md.
Replace the examples with the PATH-enabled snippet from the plan.
Verify both documents are consistent and mention PATH only in the example.

notes: Keep changes limited to documentation examples.
Use the exact PATH string specified in the plan.
